headline: Woman Attempts To Train Her Goldfish To Fetch, It Just Stares At Her For 47 Minutes
summary: The goldfish has started a TikTok account documenting her failure. It has 400,000 followers.
fullBody: Amanda McFish has been trying to teach her goldfish, Bubbles, to fetch for 8 months. Bubbles has not moved. 'He's learning,' Amanda insisted. Bubbles has started a TikTok account (@BubblesTheUnbothered) showing his 'training sessions' from his perspective — which is just him swimming in circles while Amanda talks. The account has 400,000 followers. Amanda is now 'taking a break from training' and Bubbles is 'still unbothered.'
